en.extract:
The ultramarine kingfisher (Todiramphus leucopygius) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae.


Habitat
It is native to the Solomon Islands archipelago.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

The '''ultramarine kingfisher''' ('''''Todiramphus leucopygius''''') is a [[species]] of [[bird]] in the [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] [[Alcedinidae]].

== Habitat ==
It is native to the [[Solomon Islands archipelago]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
